name: @accesslint/cli
description: CLI tool for auditing HTML accessibility using @accesslint/core

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --target=node --outdir=dist --external jsdom && bun build src/audit.ts src/inline-css.ts --target=node --outdir=dist --external jsdom --external @accesslint/core && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
